mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_record (loan_no, customer_no, amount, term_months, interest_rate, loan_date, due_date, repay_method, maturity_interest, maturity_total, repay_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{loanNo}, #{customerNo}, #{amount}, #{termMonths}, #{interestRate}, #{loanDate}, #{dueDate}, #{repayMethod}, #{maturityInterest}, #{maturityTotal}, #{repayDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT loan_no FROM loan_record ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
